# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "1.1"
services:
- name: serviceA
  url: http://serviceA:8080
- name: serviceB
  url: http://serviceB:8080
routes:
- name: routeA
  paths:
  - /api/serviceA/*
  methods:
  - GET
  hosts:
  - example.com
  service:
    name: serviceA
plugins:
- name: rate-limiting
  service:
    name: serviceA
  config:
    minute: 500
